name: Individual Pizza Pies
recipeIngredient: 2 drops red pepper flakes, up to 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Brown the ground round and drain excess grease.
3. Place each English muffin half on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Spread a layer of cooked ground round over each half.
5. Spread tomato sauce mixture over the ground round.
6. Sprinkle cheese, onion, green pepper, and mushrooms on top.
7. Bake at 425 degrees F for 5-10 minutes or until the cheese melts.
(208 calories per serving) 1 serving=1/2 Vegetable exchange 1 Bread exchange 1/2 Lean Meat exchange 1 Fat exchange
